title: Toffifee!
body:
BIG UPDATE IS HERE! CHECK VERSION 2.0.0

 

Hello this is my First mod and This mod adds the candy Toffifee! ( Toffifay in other countrys ) 

This mod is all about , yep you guessed it, TOFFIFEES! :D 

and thats all.

Suggestions are open <3

feel free to add in modpacks! :)

Pls Report issues to me on Discord: ( blackstorm1411 ) or in comments

Join My New Discord Server for new Updates and Sneak peeks and more!-

Pls Report issues to me on Discord: ( blackstorm1411 ) or in my Discord server!
-[Blackstorm Discord Server](https://discord.gg/scTRTvHURV)

! Mod was made with Mcreator !
